name: Listrak Retail Marketing Automation API
what_it_does: Retail-focused multichannel marketing automation platform with REST API — providing email and SMS marketing, cart abandonment recovery, predictive personalization, loyalty program integration, and customer analytics specifically optimized for e-commerce and retail brands.
use_cases: Triggering cart abandonment and browse abandonment email/SMS campaigns via Listrak API
Syncing e-commerce order and customer data to Listrak for personalized retail campaigns
Managing email and SMS subscriber lists and segmentation via Listrak REST API
Pulling campaign performance data (revenue, conversions, ROI) for retail marketing reporting
Integrating Listrak with e-commerce platforms (Shopify, Magento, BigCommerce) for automation
not_for: B2B lead nurturing and marketing automation (use HubSpot or Pardot for B2B)
Non-retail industries — Listrak is specifically optimized for retail/e-commerce
Simple transactional email (use Postmark or SendGrid for transactional email)
best_when: A retail or e-commerce brand needs multichannel (email + SMS) marketing automation with deep e-commerce data integration — especially for cart abandonment, post-purchase, and product recommendation campaigns.
avoid_when: You're not in retail/e-commerce, need complex B2B marketing automation, or have basic email needs that don't require retail-specific features.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped with list and segment access. Webhook for email events (opens, clicks, bounces) and SMS events. E-commerce integration via Listrak Connect (Shopify, Magento, WooCommerce, BigCommerce). Scoped by resource type (lists, subscribers, campaigns, segments). Separate API endpoints for email and SMS channels.

pricing.notes: Lititz, PA company (near Philadelphia). Founded 1999. Bootstrapped and profitable. Pioneer in e-commerce email marketing. 1,000+ retail customers including Crate & Barrel, Vera Bradley, Build-A-Bear. Predictive analytics for product recommendations. GXP (Gift Experience Platform) for gift registry integration. SMS marketing via Listrak SMS. Retail-native data model (orders, products, carts) is key differentiator vs generic marketing platforms.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for lists, subscribers, campaigns, and e-commerce data. OAuth2 auth. Good documentation for retail use cases. Retail data model (orders, products, carts) is core to API structure. Webhook for email and SMS channel events. E-commerce platform connectors handle most data sync automatically. Separate SMS and email APIs.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Subscriber reads fully idempotent. Order reads idempotent. Campaign sends not idempotent — check send status before triggering. Subscriber creation uses email as unique key — idempotent with same email.
known_agent_gotchas: Retail-specific data model — non-retail use cases not well supported
Separate email and SMS APIs — different endpoints and auth tokens
CAN-SPAM and TCPA compliance required for email and SMS respectively
TCPA: SMS requires explicit opt-in consent — Listrak provides consent management
Annual contract and dedicated onboarding required — not self-serve for new integrations

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR, CCPA, CAN-SPAM, TCPA compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 with scopes. Customer purchase and behavioral data is sensitive PII — handle per CCPA. TCPA compliance critical for SMS marketing — maintain opt-in records. CAN-SPAM requires honor unsubscribe within 10 business days. E-commerce order data includes payment method information — never store or transmit raw payment data.
